title: Register Inquisition v0.1 blueprint
goal: Define what Inquisition v0.1 is: responsibilities, forbidden actions, owned/read/write zones, status enums, self-report expectations, and produce a draft organ contract.
scope: Read current organ/self-description schemas and Kiro advisory
non_goals: Do not implement Inquisition checker scripts yet
Do not create runtime receipts yet
owner_intent: Produce a clear, machine-readable blueprint for Inquisition v0.1 that can be reviewed and modernized before implementation begins.
risks: Blueprint may be too abstract without concrete audit categories
Scope drift into implementation before review
Missing schema references for organ contract
open_questions: What is the minimal organ_contract for Inquisition v0.1?
Which audit categories are mandatory for first version?
Should blueprint include Sanctum integration spec?
no_fake_green_note: Blueprint registration does not prove implementation. Review and modernization required before execution.
